search.query: | savedsearch idp_base_v2 lookup=$lookup_name$ lob=$lob|s$ group=$group|s$ tier_1=$tier_1|s$ tier_2=$tier_2|s$ tier_3=$tier_3|s$
| fields template_name | stats values(template_name) as filter | eval filter=mvjoin(filter, "|")
| appendpipe [ | where isnotnull(child) | rename child as parent ] | rex field=parent mode=sed "s/[()]/./g" | stats values(parent) as filter | eval filter=mvjoin(filter, "|")

| rest report_as=text splunk_server=local /servicesNS/nobody/SA-ITOA/itoa_interface/base_service_template filter="{\"title\": {\"$regex\" : \"^($template_filter_regex$)$\" }}" fields="entity_rules,title" | eval value=spath(value, "{}") | mvexpand value | eval title=spath(value, "title"), id=spath(value, "_key") | eval rules=spath(value, "entity_rules{}"), value=null() | mvexpand rules | streamstats c by title | eval key=title.c, item=spath(rules, "rule_items{}") | mvexpand item | foreach field field_type value rule_type [ eval <<FIELD>>=spath(item, "<<FIELD>>")] | eval new_item=case(rule_type=="matchesblank", json_object("field", field, "field_type", field_type, "value", field, "rule_type", "matchesblank"), rule_type=="notmatchesblank", json_object("field", field, "field_type", field_type, "value", field, "rule_type", "notmatchesblank"), 1==1, item) | stats values(new_item) as item by key, title | eval new_rules=json_object("rule_condition", "AND", "rule_items", json(printf("[%s]", mvjoin(item, ",")))) | eval f=json_object("rule_items", json(printf("[%s]", mvjoin(item, ","))), "rule_condition", "AND") | stats values(f) as filter by title | eval serviceTemplatesConfig=printf("\"%s\": %s", title, json_object("entity_rules", json(printf("[%s]", mvjoin(filter, ","))))) | stats values(serviceTemplatesConfig) as serviceTemplatesConfig | eval serviceTemplatesConfig=printf("\"{%s}\"", replace(mvjoin(serviceTemplatesConfig, ","), "\"", "\\\""))
| inputlookup $lookup_name$ where group=$group|s$ | stats c by lob
| inputlookup $lookup_name$ where lob=$lob|s$ AND group=$group|s$ | dedup t1
| inputlookup $lookup_name$ where lob=$lob|s$ AND group=$group|s$ AND t1=$tier_1|s$ | dedup t2
| inputlookup $lookup_name$ where lob=$lob|s$ AND group=$group|s$ AND t1=$tier_1|s$ AND t2=$tier_2|s$ | dedup t3

condition.set: makeresults | eval msg="Pick an action to run it"
makeresults | eval msg="If you added any service templates then please reload the page now or template filters will not generate correctly - i.e. Ctrl/Cmd-R"

``` Generates CURL that clones the service template with the given id ``` savedsearch idp_base_v2 lookup=$lookup_name$ group="$group$" lob="$lob$" tier_1="$tier_1$" tier_2=$tier_2|s$ tier_3=$tier_3|s$ | fields template_name | dedup template_name | where len(template_name) > 0 | lookup itsi_service_template_sync_status_lookup title as template_name OUTPUT _key as key_found | where isnull(key_found) ``` templates that dont exist ``` | eval payload=json_object("title", template_name, "_key", "__".lower(replace(template_name, "[\s\-\.]+", "_"))."__", "base_service_template_id", "$template_clone_id$") | confitsi type=base_service_template is_bulk=0 is_update=0 is_partial=0 $comment$ confirm=1 $comment$

``` Generated payload to set the KPI urgency for the named services ``` `itoa_rest("service", "title", "^($service_filter_regex$)$", "_key,title,services_depends_on,service_tags")` | eval urg_tag=spath(value, "service_tags.tags{}")```, p=spath(value, "services_depending_on_me{}") | mvexpand p | fields - value``` | mvexpand urg_tag | search urg_tag=urg:* | rex field=urg_tag "^urg:(?<child>.+):(?<urgency>\d+)$" | join child [| inputlookup service_kpi_lookup | eval child=lower(title), child_id=_key | fields child, child_id ] | eval link=spath(value, "services_depends_on{}") | mvexpand link | where child_id=spath(link, "serviceid") | eval link=json_set(link, "overloaded_urgencies", json_object("SHKPI-".child_id, urgency)) | fields - value, splunk_server urg_tag | stats values(link) as link by id, title | eval payload=json_object("_key", id, "title", title, "services_depends_on", json(printf("[%s]", mvjoin(link, ",")))) `get_payload` | confitsi type=service $comment$ confirm=1 $comment$

``` Generates the selected services ``` savedsearch idp_base_v2 lookup=$lookup_name$ group=$group|s$ lob=$lob|s$ tier_1=$tier_1|s$ tier_2=$tier_2|s$ tier_3=$tier_3|s$ $comment$ | itsiimportobjects serviceTagsFields="tag1,tag2,tag3,tag4,tag5,tag6" serviceEnabled="1" serviceTitleField=parent serviceDependentsFields=child serviceTemplateField="template_name" serviceTemplatesConfig=$template_filter_config$ updateType=$updateType$ $comment$

``` Generates the entities for the selected applications services``` savedsearch idp_base_v2 lookup=$lookup_name$ group=$group|s$ lob=$lob|s$ tier_1=$tier_1|s$ tier_2=$tier_2|s$ tier_3=$tier_3|s$ | where isnotnull(template_name) | dedup system_app $comment$ | itsiimportobjects entityFieldMapping="" entityIdentifierFields="system_app" entityInformationalFields="group,system,app,lob,type_name,function,tech_type,node_type" entityMergeField="system_app" entityTitleField="system_app" entityTypeField="Service Entity" updateType=$updateType$ $comment$

makeresults | eval run_this_spl=" ``` <WARN>Run this SPL but double check your backup is in good order as you might need it. </WARN>``` | union [| itsidelete type=entity field=system_app pattern=\"($lob$|$tier_1$).+ABC$\" confirm=1] [| itsidelete type=service field=title pattern=\"($lob$|$tier_1$).+ABC$\" confirm=1] [| itsidelete type=base_service_template field=title pattern=\"^TO_BE_COMPLETED$\" confirm=1] "

makeresults count=10 | streamstats c | eval tech=split("lnx,win", ",") | mvexpand tech
| eval "mtx:cpu"=20+c+random()%10, "mtx:mem"=60-c+random()%10, "mtx:disk"=60+c+random()%10, "mtx:oi_write"=10+random()%10, "mtx:io_read"=3+random()%3 | eval lob="BC Industries", system="Games", app="", group="Demo", site="", tech_type=tech, function="Games", host=tech."-".c $comment$ | itsiimportobjects entityFieldMapping="" entityIdentifierFields="" entityInformationalFields="group,system,app,lob,type_name,function,tech_type,node_type" entityMergeField="host" entityTitleField="host" entityTypeField="" updateType=replace $comment$

div.b: Review Tokens to ensure correct values are set as expected, use disable import to validate without running any breaking updates.
For Template Filter Config ensure it contains all expected templates or services will not generate with correct entity filters.

panel.title: Actions Panel for generating various bits of config

viz.title: Service Tree - select a node to view both proposed and existing config

search.query: | where isnotnull(child) | dedup parent child | table parent, child

| search parent="$clicked$" | stats values(*) as * by parent | eval tags=mvappend(tag1, tag2, tag3, tag4, tag5, mvjoin(tag6, " ")) | eval fields=split(printf("lob: %s|group: %s|site: %s|tier_1: %s|app : %s|function: %s|urgency: %s", lob,group,site,tier_1,app,function,urgency), "|") | table parent* template_name child* tags pattern fields | transpose

table.title: Existing Service Config - if it exists

search.query:
| rest report_as=text splunk_server=local /servicesNS/nobody/SA-ITOA/itoa_interface/service filter="{\"title\": \"$clicked$\"}" fields="title,_key,base_service_template_id,entity_rules,service_tags,services_depends_on" | eval value=spath(value, "{}") | mvexpand value | eval "title"=spath(value, "title"), "service_id"=spath(value, "_key") | eval template_id=coalesce(spath(value, "base_service_template_id"), "n/a") | eval er=coalesce(spath(value, "entity_rules{}"), "n/a") | eval dependecies=spath(value, "services_depends_on{}") | mvexpand dependecies | eval child=spath(dependecies, "overloaded_urgencies") | rex field=child "\"(?<child>[^\"]+)\"[:\s]+(?<urgency>\d+)"
| appendpipe [| where isnull(child)|eval child=spath(dependecies, "serviceid") | lookup service_kpi_lookup _key as child OUTPUT title as child | eval c2=child."::11 (Default)"] | lookup service_kpi_lookup kpis._key as child OUTPUT title as child | eval children=coalesce(child."::".urgency, c2)
| eval "tags"=spath(value, "service_tags.tags{}") | lookup itsi_service_template_sync_status_lookup _key as template_id OUTPUT title as template_name | fields - _* splunk_server value | table title service_id template* er tags children
| mvexpand er | eval entity_rule_items=spath(er, "rule_items{}") | mvexpand entity_rule_items | eval entity_rules=printf("%s:%s %s %s", upper(spath(entity_rule_items, "field_type")), spath(entity_rule_items, "field"), case(spath(entity_rule_items, "rule_type")=="matches", "==", spath(entity_rule_items, "rule_type")=="notmatches", "!=", 1==1, upper(spath(entity_rule_items, "rule_type"))), spath(entity_rule_items, "value")) | stats values(*) as * by title service_id er | fields - er* | eval entity_rules=printf("------ %s ------", mvjoin(entity_rules, " ")) | stats values(*) as * by title service_id | table title service_id template* * | transpose | rename "row 1" as value | appendpipe [ | stats count | where count=0 | eval column="No Service called '$clicked$' found" | table column]
